description_long: This is a modern loft-style bunk bed constructed primarily from wood with a light, natural finish. The bed features an upper sleeping platform with protective side rails and a lower full-size mattress area. On one side, there is a staircase with integrated drawers for storage, while the opposite side is enclosed with solid wood panels. The front of the bed includes a wide opening for easy access to the lower mattress, and the staircase provides safe access to the upper bunk. The design is functional and space-saving, making it suitable for urban apartments or shared living spaces. The overall appearance is clean, contemporary, and practical, with visible wood grain and minimalistic lines.
description: A modern wooden bunk bed with an upper sleeping platform, lower mattress, and a staircase with built-in storage drawers. The design is clean, space-saving, and features protective rails and solid wood panels.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid wood panel and the angled staircase with cut-out handrails.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the lower mattress, wide access opening, and the staircase with visible storage drawers on the left.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the solid wood panel and the upper sleeping platform's protective rail.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the full height of the bed, the staircase with multiple drawers, and the continuous wood paneling.
